title: Laylat al-Qadr — 21st Night

slides.title: 2 Rakʿah Salat
slides.instruction: In every rakʿah recite Surah al-Hamd once and Surah al-Ikhlas seven times. After completing the prayer, continue with the forgiveness amaal for this night.
slides.repeat: After the salat, continue to the next section.
slides.note: Representative instruction slide. Replace with the exact mosque-approved wording if needed.

slides.title: 70x Istighfar
slides.instruction: Recite the prescribed istighfar seventy times with attention and humility.
slides.english: I seek the forgiveness of Allah and I turn to Him in repentance.
slides.note: Use this slide until the exact approved wording/chunking is inserted.

slides.title: 100x Istighfar
slides.instruction: Continue with the one-hundred-fold istighfar for the 21st night amaal.
slides.english: I seek forgiveness from Allah, my Lord, and I turn to Him in repentance.
slides.note: Replace with the exact local source text if your programme uses a different wording.

slides.title: Bidding Farewell
slides.instruction: End the night with tawassul, submit the evening's deeds to Allah, ask for acceptance, and close with humility and hope.

slides.title: Salawāt on Sayyeda Fatima (sa)
slides.instruction: Recite salawāt and gift the reward to Sayyeda Fatima al-Zahra (sa), asking Allah to accept the aʿmāl through her intercession.
slides.note: Instruction slide. Add exact local wording if desired.

slides.title: Recite Qur’an 2:127
slides.instruction: Recite Qur’an 2:127 and ask Allah to accept these deeds just as He accepted from Ibrahim and Isma'il (as).
slides.note: Instruction-led slide. The ayah text can be added later if the centre wants it shown here.

slides.title: Shukran Lillah
slides.instruction: Thank Allah for the tawfiq to complete the aʿmāl and end the programme with gratitude.
